Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Willie Daniels .
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Traci Rogers is present.
Attorney Brian Stine representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of AUG-13-2012 is vacated.
